name: @freeside-worlds/shadow-substrate
description: The pure, distributed shadow core (the keystone) — a universal preview/diff primitive. PURE Effect functions (computeProposed/diff/roleMapVersionHash/transition) + ports as Context.Tags + typed error ADT + config-surface payload schemas + the Discrepancy render-model. ZERO I/O lives here; all I/O is injected as Layers by the consuming lenses. Distributed git-source/SHA-pinned, never npm (sovereign-distribution doctrine). Cycle: shadow-onboarding-substrate (S0).
